'''Shorshone''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a member of the [[Stark Commercial Combine|Stark Collective]]. He was a bridge officer on its [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Raptor (starship)|''Raptor'']], and was killed aboard it when the ship was destroyed in the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]].

==Appearances==
